infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Tally needs access to your photos to let you choose a group icon.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Tally uses the camera to scan receipts and automatically extract expense details using AI.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Tally uses the microphone to record a short voice description of a bill, which is sent to AI to extract expenses.

plugins.photosPermission: Tally needs access to your photos to let you choose a group icon.
plugins.cameraPermission: Tally uses the camera to scan receipts and automatically extract expense details using AI.

plugins.microphonePermission: Tally uses the microphone to record a short voice description of a bill, which is sent to AI to extract expenses.

plugins.cameraPermission: Tally uses the camera to scan QR codes for group invites and to scan receipts for expense extraction.
